nasb.text: For the king and his princes and all the assembly in Jerusalem had decided to celebrate the Passover in the second month,

esv.text: For the king and his princes and all the assembly in Jerusalem had taken counsel to keep the Passover in the second month—

cnv.text: 因為王和眾領袖，以及耶路撒冷的全體會眾曾經商議，要在二月守逾越節。

ccb.text: 王、众官员及耶路撒冷的全体会众决定在二月守逾越节。
